title: Consolidate the visible plugin readout into one multiline player summary
summary: 0.6.62 adds one operator-facing player summary field in the plugin UI, removes the noisy visible CUA status text from the panel, and keeps the underlying playback, demo3, and transport seams unchanged.
changes: The plugin UI now shows one multiline FrameAngel Player Summary field with playback or slideshow status, loop, shuffle, media kind, concise format info, progress, total, remaining, folder, and file.
The visible CUA status text row is removed from the plugin panel, while the underlying transient plumbing remains intact.
The summary uses reliable runtime facts already available in the player lane: current media path, loop and random state, timeline, playlist counts, dimensions, and video frame rate when available.
reasoning: The plugin panel had useful state spread across transient internal readback fields and an old CUA status string that reads more like debug output than operator value. A single summary block is more useful and less noisy, and the current runtime already exposes enough data to build it without reopening transport or scene bindings.
operatorVisibleOutcomes: The plugin shows one consolidated player summary instead of the old visible CUA status text.
Video summaries show concise type and format information plus progress, total, remaining, folder, and file.
Image summaries show slideshow status, counts for progress, total, remaining, and the current folder and file.
knownIssues: This slice does not change movie transport, image transport, sync cadence, shuffle policy, demo3 text bindings, slideshow, right-stick volume, or deferred gaze work.
The summary format line intentionally stays conservative and only shows reliable extension, dimensions, and video frame rate when available.
verification: BuildUi now creates a single visible playerRuntimeSummaryField in FASyncRuntime.cs.
BuildCuaPlayerInputUi no longer creates the visible playerInputStateField row in FASyncRuntime.CuaPlayerInputModule.cs.
RefreshVisiblePlayerDebugFields now builds and assigns one multiline runtime summary in FASyncRuntime.Player.cs.
